steps.title: Look for a later decrease
steps.content: The claim is that some lakes saw a decline in surface-ice duration between the early 1980s and the mid-2000s. Supporting data must compare the same lake across time and show fewer days in the later winter.

steps.title: Avoid unrelated comparisons
steps.content: A and D compare different lakes and latitude rather than a decline over time. B shows Lake Baikal had more ice days later, which is an increase. The remaining option gives the same-lake decrease the claim requires. The answer is C.
